inputs.label: Effective Mass Ratio (m*/m₀)
inputs.businessContext: Particle effective mass relative to free electron mass (m₀ = 9.1093837e-31 kg). For electron, use 1.0; for hole, use appropriate value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Particle effective mass relative to free electron mass (m₀ = 9.1093837e-31 kg). For electron, use 1.0; for hole, use appropriate value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parçacığın serbest elektron kütlesine (m₀ = 9.1093837e-31 kg) göre etkin kütlesi. Elektron için 1.0 kullanın; boşluk için uygun değeri kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektive Masse des Teilchens relativ zur freien Elektronenmasse (m₀ = 9,1093837e-31 kg). Für Elektronen 1,0; für Löcher entsprechenden Wert verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse effective de la particule par rapport à la masse de l'électron libre (m₀ = 9,1093837e-31 kg). Pour un électron, utiliser 1,0 ; pour un trou, utiliser la valeur appropriée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa efectiva de la partícula relativa a la masa del electrón libre (m₀ = 9.1093837e-31 kg). Para electrones, use 1.0; para huecos, use el valor apropiado.

inputs.label: Barrier Height (V)
inputs.businessContext: Potential barrier height in electronvolts. Must be greater than particle energy for tunneling to occur classically.

businessContext_i18n.en: Potential barrier height in electronvolts. Must be greater than particle energy for tunneling to occur classically.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektronvolt cinsinden potansiyel bariyer yüksekliği. Klasik olarak tünelleme gerçekleşmesi için parçacık enerjisinden büyük olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Potenzielle Barrierenhöhe in Elektronenvolt. Muss größer als die Teilchenenergie sein, damit klassisch Tunneln möglich ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur de la barrière de potentiel en électronvolts. Doit être supérieure à l'énergie de la particule pour un effet tunnel classique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de la barrera de potencial en electronvoltios. Debe ser mayor que la energía de la partícula para que ocurra tunelamiento clásico.

inputs.label: Particle Energy (E)
inputs.businessContext: Energy of the incident particle. Must be less than barrier height for meaningful tunneling probability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy of the incident particle. Must be less than barrier height for meaningful tunneling probability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelen parçacığın enerjisi. Anlamlı bir tünelleme olasılığı için bariyer yüksekliğinden küçük olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Energie des einfallenden Teilchens. Muss kleiner als die Barrierenhöhe sein, um eine sinnvolle Tunnelwahrscheinlichkeit zu erhalten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Énergie de la particule incidente. Doit être inférieure à la hauteur de barrière pour une probabilité d'effet tunnel significative.
businessContext_i18n.es: Energía de la partícula incidente. Debe ser menor que la altura de la barrera para una probabilidad de tunelamiento significativa.

inputs.label: Barrier Width (d)
inputs.businessContext: Width of the potential barrier in nanometers. Typical nanoscale dimensions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the potential barrier in nanometers. Typical nanoscale dimensions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nanometre cinsinden potansiyel bariyer genişliği. Tipik nano ölçekli boyutlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite der potenziellen Barriere in Nanometern. Typische Nanometerabmessungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la barrière de potentiel en nanomètres. Dimensions nanométriques typiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la barrera de potencial en nanómetros. Dimensiones típicas a nanoescala.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
